_placeholders.OPENROUTER_API_KEY: Replace in Authorization header — Bearer token from https://openrouter.ai/keys
_placeholders.HEADERS: Replace header values if site URL or app title changes
_placeholders.BODY: Replace system prompt with contents of openrouter/property_parser_prompt.md; map {{source_url}} from upstream module
_placeholders.Max tokens: Default: 4096 — increase if content drafts are truncated

metadata.notes: Replace OPENROUTER_API_KEY, MODEL, HEADERS, BODY, Temperature, and Max tokens before activation. Full system prompt: releases/0.4/openrouter/property_parser_prompt.md. Response JSON path: choices[0].message.content. Validate against releases/0.4/openrouter/response_schema.json.
